en: Stranger Things Season 4 is finally here!
ko: 기묘한 이야기 시즌 4가 드디어 나왔어. 최신 넷플릭스 예고편에 나온

en: Let's look at some of the vocabulary used in the latest Netflix trailer.
In informal situations, you can use as hell after adjectives or adverbs
ko: 비격식 상황에서 형용사나 부사 뒤에 as hell을 붙여서

en: to emphasize or add force to what you're saying.
For example, risky as hell, very risky.
ko: risky as hell 매우 위험한. Hot as hell 매우 더운.

en: Hot as hell, very hot. Cold as hell, very cold.
ko: risky as hell 매우 위험한. Hot as hell 매우 더운.
Cold as hell 매우 추운. Sure as hell 매우 확실한.

en: When trying to figure out whether a plan will succeed,
ko: 계획이 성공할지 판단할 때 odds는 성공할 가능성이

en: the odds refer to how likely or how possible it is to achieve success.
